activation_triggers: agent handoff requests reground_first or route_to_playbook
derived projection is degraded_source_first or quarantined
stop_conditions: any mutation requires evidence that is not yet present
playbook route depends on a quarantined KAG projection
agent posture blocks memory writeback or broad mutation

steps.reason: Preserve the bounded owner-local output before seeking wider inference.
Shift control to a reviewer role before any broader state change.
Use source-first or route-pack fallback if derived substrate is degraded.

notes: The degraded lane stays weaker than the normal route and does not silently reopen blocked actions.
